news.title: Jamie Dimon says Iran war makes Middle East peace prospects better in the long term

news.title_cn: 川普和德黑蘭發出混合訊號，巴基斯坦提出協助美伊戰爭談判

news.title: Arm releases first in-house chip, with Meta as debut customer

news.title: Senate, White House start to coalesce around ending DHS shutdown amid TSA delays

news.title: Iran war has altered the global natural gas market. Goldman says these 3 stocks will benefit

news.title: The Iran crisis is making this retirement strategy look better than it has in decades

news.title: ‘We’re living the simple life’: I was a fisherman and my wife was a nurse. We retired with $6 million. Here’s how we did it.
news.title_cn: 「我們過著簡單的生活」：我是一名漁民，我的妻子是一名護士。我們帶著 600 萬美元退休了。我們是這樣做的。
